✨ DaisyP • Producer • Vocalist • Sound Explorer

Playful, purple-tinted sound with an experimental soul.

I'm Maria Pizarro, the person behind the music. DaisyP is my artist identity, and Daisy Time is the online world around it. I'm a Portuguese producer, vocalist, and performer based in Aylesbury, England, blending expressive vocals, hands-on production, and unusual textures to create music that feels curious, colourful, and emotionally alive.

About Me

I'm a genre-curious producer with a performer's heart.

I bring together technical production training, expressive performance, and a warm creative personality. I am drawn to music that takes risks: strange sounds, unexpected textures, emotional vocals, and ideas that do not sit neatly inside one box.

🎓

Creative Music Graduate

With both a Bachelor's and Master's in Creative Music Production from ICMP, I have spent years developing my sound, workflow, and creative confidence.

🎙️

Voice-Led Performer

My background in singing and live performance gives my music a human centre: expressive, energetic, and rooted in connection.

🎛️

Hands-On Producer

From building arrangements to mixing and mastering, I enjoy shaping ideas from raw sketches into finished, characterful tracks.

Bio: I use Maria Pizarro as my professional name, DaisyP as my artist identity, and Daisy Time as the online persona that carries my creative world across platforms. I'm a Portuguese music producer, vocalist, and performer with a love for experimental sound and expressive storytelling. After completing both a Bachelor's and Master's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, I am now looking for my next step in the music industry. My creative style is colourful, open-minded, and full of personality, combining vocals, guitar, piano, production, mixing, and mastering into a flexible skillset built for collaboration, learning, and growth.

Education & Experience

My creative foundation has been shaped by study, projects, and performance.

My background combines academic training with years of practical music-making, from university production projects to performing with friends in Portugal.

ICMP Graduate

Five years of Creative Music Production.

I completed both my Bachelor's and Master's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, building a strong foundation in recording, arranging, production, mixing, mastering, and creative project development.

That academic path sits alongside real performance experience, giving me a practical understanding of both the technical and emotional sides of music.

Education

  • I completed a Bachelor's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, focused on developing a strong creative and technical foundation.
  • I completed a Master's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, expanding my approach to production, experimentation, and finished musical work.
  • Across five years of project-based music creation, I worked across recording, arrangement, performance, mixing, mastering, and creative development.

Experience

  • I performed with friends in a band around Portugal, building confidence, collaboration skills, and real live-music experience.
  • I produced a wide range of songs and university projects across five years of Creative Music Production study.
  • I am comfortable moving between vocals, instruments, production decisions, arrangement ideas, and final audio polish.
  • I am open to remote work, commuting, and flexible roles that offer hands-on experience in the music industry.
Professional singing Live performance Guitar Piano Music production Mixing Mastering Experimental music

Career Direction

I'm ready to bring energy, adaptability, and creativity into the industry.

I am looking for opportunities across the music industry where I can learn, contribute, and grow. I am open to a wide range of roles, from production and studio support to performance, events, creative assistance, and artist-focused work. What matters most to me is gaining real experience, being useful to a team, and staying close to music.

🎤

Vocalist / Performer

I bring expressive vocals, live performance experience, and a natural connection to musical storytelling.

🎛️

Production Assistant

I have Creative Music Production training with practical experience in arranging, producing, mixing, and mastering tracks.

🎸

Live Music Support

I have band experience, instrumental ability, and an understanding of how music comes together in real performance settings.

🎧

Studio / Audio Roles

I bring a hands-on, curious approach to audio work and a strong interest in learning from professional environments.

📍

Local or Remote

I am based in Aylesbury, England, with remote availability and the ability to commute for the right opportunity.

✨

Creative Team Player

I am bubbly, flexible, and open-minded, ready to support projects, artists, studios, venues, or music teams.
